{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-89p7-7cq3-hhr2. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A vulnerability in the rm utility of uutils coreutils allows the bypass of safeguard mechanisms intended to protect the current directory. While the utility correctly refuses to delete . or .., it fails to recognize equivalent paths with trailing slashes, such as ./ or .///. An accidental or malicious execution of rm -rf ./ results in the silent recursive deletion of all contents within the current directory. The command further obscures the data loss by reporting a misleading 'Invalid input' error, which may cause users to miss the critical window for data recovery.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vchc-9ggh-3236", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:30:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vchc-9ggh-3236", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vchc-9ggh-3236"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35363", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/9749", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vchc-9ggh-3236"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Path Traversal issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:20:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vchc-9ggh-3236", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T20:20:49Z"}
